messages.author: sawtac
messages.text: I'm new to meshcore but not to meshtastic. Boise is a mess. Lets get standardized and start making things work. I believe the new radio settings should be: FQ: 910.525 BW: 62.5 SF: 7 CR: 5 If you're on the old settings please change or let us know why it's better.
messages.content_html: I'm new to meshcore but not to meshtastic. Boise is a mess. Lets get standardized and start making things work. I believe the new radio settings should be: FQ: 910.525 BW: 62.5 SF: 7 CR: 5 If you're on the old settings please change or let us know why it's better.

messages.author: Uncle Lit
messages.text: Hi! puget sound folks are expanding eastward soon to central washington and hopefully later eastern washington. would be awesome to be able to reach you in Boise some day. We are all on the USA/Canada (recommended) preset, as you listed above.
messages.content_html: Hi! puget sound folks are expanding eastward soon to central washington and hopefully later eastern washington. would be awesome to be able to reach you in Boise some day. We are all on the USA/Canada (recommended) preset, as you listed above.

messages.author: sawtac
messages.text: Looking forward to it. But right now I'd just be happy with a few connections locally.
messages.content_html: Looking forward to it. But right now I'd just be happy with a few connections locally.

messages.author: Uncle Lit
messages.text: yes, it takes time for people to join the meshcore mesh. but once they have a taste of it and see how reliable messaging is with meshcore, more and more will come. this is how it evolved in the puget sound area. back in april I was 20% of the mesh. now we have hundreds of repeaters and many times more companions.
messages.content_html: yes, it takes time for people to join the meshcore mesh. but once they have a taste of it and see how reliable messaging is with meshcore, more and more will come. this is how it evolved in the puget sound area. back in april I was 20% of the mesh. now we have hundreds of repeaters and many times more companions.
messages.reply_html:
sawtac
Looking forward to it. But right now I'd just be happy with a few connections locally.

messages.author: sawtac
messages.text: One more guy added. I guess we'll see what happens. Thanks!
messages.content_html: One more guy added. I guess we'll see what happens. Thanks!
messages.reactions_html: 1

messages.author: Zeb Palmer (IdahoMesh)
messages.text: There's been a lot of work done recently in SW Idaho and more coming soon. we have a group forming on our own discord as well. With the two most recent repeaters we've got stable coverage across the entire Boise metro area.
